title: Day-2.5 alt-data adds (GLD holdings, HY credit spread, UMCSENT)
why: The regime dossier system is the natural place to surface these: GLD daily holdings (gold-flow proxy; ingestion lives in cache/alt/ already from B0015a), FRED HY credit spread (BEAR_STRESSED differentiator), UMCSENT (sentiment regime overlay). Each is additive to [pipeline/macro_fetch.py](pipeline/macro_fetch.py) and [phase5/regime_stats.py](phase5/regime_stats.py).
value_rationale: M (improves future hypothesis priors; no impact on existing audited proposals)
scope: add 2 FRED codes (BAMLH0A0HYM2, UMCSENT) + GLD holdings to the dossier `features_quantile_summary`; verify `.shift(1)` discipline holds; regenerate XAU dossiers. Do NOT retro-add to existing audited proposals.
